channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [SUNLOC] Sunil Healthcare Board Meeting on May 29, 2026
item.description:
Sunil Healthcare Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held via video conferencing. The trading window remains closed from April 1, 2026, to May 31, 2026.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026, to approve FY26 results.
  • Audited standalone and consolidated financial results will be considered.
  • Meeting to be held via video conferencing.
  • Trading window closed from April 1 to May 31, 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sunil Healthcare Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [OXYGENTAPH] Oxygenta Pharma Board Meeting on May 23, 2026
item.description:
Oxygenta Pharmaceutical Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 23, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the audit report for the same period. The meeting will also address any other business with the chair's permission.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 23, 2026.
  • Audited financial results for Q4 and FY26 to be considered.
  • Audit report for the year ended March 31, 2026, on the agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Oxygenta Pharmaceutical Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ANTARIKSH] Antariksh Industries Board Meeting on May 22, 2026
item.description:
Antariksh Industries Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 22, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. The trading window for designated persons has been closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after the public announcement of the board meeting outcomes.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 22, 2026 to approve FY26 financial results.
  • Final dividend for FY26 will be considered, subject to shareholder approval.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, for designated persons.
  • Meeting is pursuant to Regulation 29 of SEBI Listing Regulations, 2015.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Antariksh Industries Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [SIMPLXMIL] Simplex Mills: Audited Financial Results for FY26 Approved
item.description:
Simplex Mills Company Ltd. announced the approval of audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, during a board meeting held on May 19, 2026. The auditor's report, issued by Khandelwal and Mehta LLP, contains an unmodified opinion. The 28th Annual General Meeting is scheduled for August 4, 2026. The board meeting commenced at 10:45 a.m. and concluded at 11:45 a.m.

  • Simplex Mills approved audited financial results for FY26 on May 19, 2026.
  • Auditor's report by Khandelwal and Mehta LLP has an unmodified opinion.
  • The 28th Annual General Meeting will be held on August 4, 2026.
  • Cash and cash equivalents decreased from ₹10.20 Lakhs to ₹8.06 Lakhs year-over-year.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SIMPLEX MILLS COMPANY LTD. | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [HPBL] HCP Plastene Board Meeting on May 28, 2026 to Approve Audited Results
item.description:
HCP Plastene Bulkpack Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, along with the audit report. The trading window, which has been closed since April 1, 2026, will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are publicly announced.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Consideration of standalone and consolidated financial results for Q4 and FY26.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post result announcement.
  • Meeting to be held at the company's registered office.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HCP Plastene Bulkpack Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [ORICON] Oricon Enterprises Board Meeting Scheduled for May 29, 2026
item.description:
Oricon Enterprises Ltd has announced a Board of Directors meeting scheduled for May 29, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial statements for the quarter/year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider and recommend a dividend on equity shares for the financial year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • Board to consider audited financial statements for FY26.
  • Dividend on equity shares to be considered at the meeting.
  • Trading window remains closed until 48 hours post results.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: ORICON ENTERPRISES LTD.-$ | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [DOLATALGO] Dolat Algotech penalized ₹1.18 Lakh by NSE Clearing
item.description:
Dolat Algotech Ltd has been penalized ₹1,18,000 by NSE Clearing Limited (NCL) for violating TM/FPI level position limits in the F&O segment. The penalty includes a basic fine of ₹1,00,000 plus GST of ₹18,000. The company stated that the penalty will not have a material impact on its financials or operations beyond the penalty amount.

  • Dolat Algotech received intimation from NSE Clearing Limited (NCL) regarding the penalty.
  • The penalty amount is ₹1,18,000, including GST.
  • The violation pertains to TM/FPI level position limits in the F&O segment.
  • The company claims the penalty will not materially impact its financials or operations.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dolat Algotech Ltd | Category: Tax & Penalty

item.title: [RAFL] Raghuvansh Agrofarms Board Meeting on May 28, 2026
item.description:
Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 28, 2026, to approve the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will be held at the company's corporate office in Kanpur. The trading window for dealing in the company's securities has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the financial results are declared.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 28, 2026, to approve audited financial results.
  • Financial results are for the year ended March 31, 2026.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results declaration.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Raghuvansh Agrofarms Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [RAJPUTANA] Rajputana Investment Board Meeting on May 27, 2026
item.description:
Rajputana Investment and Finance Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 27, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone financial results for the fourth quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider the re-appointment of Mr. R Sreenivasan as internal auditor for FY 2026-27, record director's interest disclosures, note confirmations from directors under Section 164(2) of the Company Act 2013, and consider the declaration by independent directors. The trading window will open 48 hours after the announcement of the audited financial results.

  • Board to approve audited standalone financial results for FY26.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. R Sreenivasan as internal auditor for FY27 to be considered.
  • Trading window to open 48 hours post financial results announcement.
  • Directors' disclosures and confirmations to be recorded and noted.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Rajputana Investment and Finance Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AMBITION] Ambition Mica: Resolution Plan Breach, CIRP Re-initiation
item.description:
The resolution plan for Ambition Mica Ltd, previously approved by the Adjudicating Authority, is facing challenges due to breaches by the Successful Resolution Applicant (SRA). An interlocutory application has been filed under Section 74(3) of the Insolvency and Bankruptcy Code, 2016, seeking directions against the SRA and re-initiation of the Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP). The application cites non-adherence to the payment timeline outlined in the approved resolution plan and requests the issuance of Form G, along with an extension for completing the CIRP period.

  • Resolution plan implementation overseen by a monitoring committee faces breaches.
  • Application filed to NCLT Ahmedabad seeking CIRP re-initiation due to breaches.
  • Breach relates to non-adherence of payment timelines by the SRA.
  • Applicant seeks directions against the SRA and CIRP extension.
  • The application references multiple annexures including committee meeting minutes and email correspondence.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Ambition Mica Ltd | Category: Legal
